Section Title: ... > About Mahindra Manulife Asia Pacific REITs FoF
Content:
Mahindra Manulife Asia Pacific REITs FoF Direct - Growth is a International mutual fund scheme from Mahindra Manulife Mutual Fund . This fund has been in existence for 4 yrs 5 m, having been launched on 28/09/2021. Mahindra Manulife Asia Pacific REITs FoF Direct - Growth has ₹44 Crores worth of assets under management (AUM) as on 31/01/2026 and is medium-sized fund of its category. The latest Net Asset Value (NAV) of Mahindra Manulife Asia Pacific REITs FoF Direct - Growth as of 06/03/2026 is ₹10.91. The fund has an expense ratio of 0.49%, which is less than what most other International funds charge.
 ...

Section Title: ... > Mahindra Manulife Asia Pacific REITs FoF Direct - Growth Returns
Content:
How much does this mutual fund charge as expense ratio?
The Mahindra Manulife Asia Pacific REITs FoF - Direct Growth has an expense ratio of **0.49%** , representing the annual cost of managing and operating the fund. This fee is deducted from the fund's AUM while declaring the daily NAV, reducing investor returns.
What is the AUM or fund size of this mutual fund?
The Mahindra Manulife Asia Pacific REITs FoF currently has assets under management (AUM) or fund size valued at approximately **44 Cr** as on Jan 31, 2026.
What is risk level of Mahindra Manulife Asia Pacific REITs FoF?
This is a International fund comes with Very High risk.
Is there any lock-in period in this mutual fund?
No, this fund does not have any lock-in period.

Section Title: Mahindra Manulife Asia Pacific REITs FoF Direct Growth > Understand terms > Expense ratio
Content:
A fee payable to a mutual fund house for managing your mutual fund investments. It is the total percentage of a company's fund assets used for administrative, management, advertising, and other expenses.
Section Title: Mahindra Manulife Asia Pacific REITs FoF Direct Growth > Understand terms > Expense ratio > Tax
Content:
A percentage of your capital gains payable to the government upon exiting your mutual fund investments. Taxation is categorized as long-term capital gains (LTCG) and short-term capital gains (STCG) depending on your holding period and the type of fund.
Section Title: Mahindra Manulife Asia Pacific REITs FoF Direct Growth > ... > Expense ratio > Tax > Exit load
Content:
A fee payable to a mutual fund house for exiting a fund (fully or partially) before the completion of a specified period from the date of investment.
Section Title: Mahindra Manulife Asia Pacific REITs FoF Direct Growth > ... > Expense ratio > Tax > Stamp duty
Content:
A form of tax payable for the purchase or sale of an asset or security.

Section Title: ... > ### About Mahindra Manulife Asia Pacific REITs FoF Direct Growth
Content:
Mahindra Manulife Asia Pacific REITs FoF Direct Growth is a Equity Mutual Fund Scheme launched by Mahindra Mutual Fund. This scheme was made available to investors on 04 Feb 2016. Krishna Sanghavi is the Current Fund Manager of Mahindra Manulife Asia Pacific REITs FoF Direct Growth fund. The fund currently has an Asset Under Management(AUM) of ₹4,742 Cr and the Latest NAV as of 02 Apr 2026 is ₹10.62.
The Mahindra Manulife Asia Pacific REITs FoF Direct Growth is rated Very High risk. Minimum SIP Investment is set to ₹1,000. Exit Load for units in excess of 10% of the investment,1% will be charged for redemption within 12 months
